name: read_file
description: Read a file and return its text content. Use this to inspect downloaded files, check data structures, or read any text-based file. Returns at most max_lines lines (default 100).

path.description: Absolute path to the file to read

max_lines.description: Maximum number of lines to return (default 100 if omitted by caller, but must be provided). Use a smaller value for large files to avoid overwhelming context.
